THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ DE SANTOS, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00, PLAINTIFF DID NOT CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT HIS WALLET CONTAINED $3200.00 IN CASH.
